current_entry.name: Interactivity: Calculations and Scripts

current_entry.description: Interactivity lets you run local shell commands and scripts directly within your notes, providing the output alongside your written content. Use your favorite tools like Python, Node.js, Java, Perl, PHP, bash, or any other REPLs while taking notes.
